page_title: List of Fullmetal Alchemist Video Games
text:
Several video games based on Fullmetal Alchemist have been released. To date, Square Enix has released a series of three role-playing games for PlayStation 2 and two games for Nintendo Wii, and Bandai has released several different games for various consoles. The [Adult Swim] website also had four flash games based on the 2003 series.

Some games are based off of the 2003 anime adaptation, while others are based off of the 2009 anime. Each has been appropriately marked.

2003 Anime Timeline

Square Enix Games

Fullmetal Alchemist and the Broken Angel (PS2)
Fullmetal Alchemist 2: Curse of the Crimson Elixir (PS2)
Fullmetal Alchemist 3: The Girl Who Succeeds God (PS2)

Bandai Games

Fullmetal Alchemist: Dream Carnival (PS2)
Fullmetal Alchemist: Stray Rondo (GBA)
Fullmetal Alchemist: Sonata of Memories (GBA)
Fullmetal Alchemist: Dual Sympathy (DS)

Destineer Games

Fullmetal Alchemist: Trading Card Game (DS)

[Adult Swim] Games

Flameout (Flash)
Iron and Flame (Flash)
State Alchemy Exam (Flash)
FullMetal Alchemist: Quest For The Philosopher's Stone (Flash)

APPLIYA Games

Fullmetal Alchemist: State Alchemy Exam (iOS)

2009 Anime Timeline

Square Enix Games

Fullmetal Alchemist: Prince of the Dawn (Wii)
Fullmetal Alchemist: Daughter of the Dusk (Wii)
Fullmetal Alchemist Mobile (Android and iOS)

Bandai Games

Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood (PSP)
Fullmetal Alchemist: To the Promised Day (PSP)
